creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption: Would you visit this Hidden Gem NYC Park? #nyc #NewYork #travel #hiddengem #nybucketlist

transcription.text: Did you know that there's a park in New York City that kinda looks like Central Park, but only the locals know about? Tucked away on the Upper East Side, you'll find 15 acres of winding paths, the stunning waterfront promenade with East River views, flower gardens, the mansion where the mayor lives, and the secret Peter Pan statue in the center of the park. But that's not all, because you'll also find dog parks, playgrounds, tennis, basketball, places to lay out in the sun, and it even attaches to the $4.50 ferry which takes you all the way to Wall Street with breathtaking New York City views. This is Carl Schurz Park.
